title: German Crusted Schnitzel
description: A classic German dish featuring a crispy crust and a tender interior. Best served with a side of tangy lemon wedges.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together soy and butter until well combined.
2. Add the pork cutlets to the marinade, coating both sides evenly.
3. Let the pork marinate for at least 15 minutes.
5. In a separate dish, place the crust.
6. Dredge the marinated pork cutlets in the crust, pressing gently to adhere.
7. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
8. Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and sear the coated pork cutlets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
9. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
10. Let the schnitzel rest for 5 minutes before serving.
